news.t: Best Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETFs for Q1 2020

overview.description: The FlexShares Credit-Scored US Long Corporate Bond Index Fund (LKOR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated investment grade corporate bonds with at least 10 years to maturity selected and weighted by fundamental factors. LKOR was launched on Sep 24, 2015 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust US Long Corporate Bond Quality Value Index

data.title: Best Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETFs for Q1 2020
data.text: The best Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETFs for Q1 2020 are LKOR, SPLB, and VCLT.
